questions.prompt: Определите правильную косвенную речь для: 'I will meet you tomorrow.'

choices.text: He said he would meet me tomorrow.
He said he would meet me the next day.
He said he would meet me the day before.
He said he would meet me today.

questions.explanation: В косвенной речи указатель времени 'tomorrow' меняется на 'the next day'.

questions.prompt: Определите правильную косвенную речь для: 'I saw him yesterday.'

choices.text: She said she saw him yesterday.
She said she saw him the day before.
She said she had seen him yesterday.
She said she had seen him the day before.

questions.explanation: В косвенной речи указатель времени 'yesterday' меняется на 'the day before'.

questions.prompt: Определите правильную косвенную речь для: 'This is my book.'

choices.text: That is my book.
That is his book.
This is his book.
This is my book.

questions.explanation: В косвенной речи указатель 'this' меняется на 'that'.

questions.prompt: Определите правильную косвенную речь для: 'I am here now.'

choices.text: He said he was here.
He said he was there.
He said he was now.
He said he was then.

questions.explanation: В косвенной речи указатель места 'here' меняется на 'there'.

questions.prompt: Определите правильную косвенную речь для: 'I will do it today.'

choices.text: He said he would do it today.
He said he would do it that day.
He said he would do it the day before.
He said he would do it tomorrow.

questions.explanation: В косвенной речи указатель времени 'today' меняется на 'that day'.

questions.prompt: Определите правильную косвенную речь для: 'I saw her here yesterday.'

choices.text: She said she saw her here yesterday.
She said she saw her there yesterday.
She said she had seen her there the day before.
She said she had seen her here the day before.

questions.explanation: В косвенной речи 'here' меняется на 'there', а 'yesterday' — на 'the day before'.

questions.prompt: Определите правильную косвенную речь для: 'I will be there tomorrow.'

choices.text: He said he would be there tomorrow.
He said he would be there the next day.
He said he would be there the day before.
He said he would be there today.

questions.explanation: В косвенной речи 'tomorrow' меняется на 'the next day', а 'there' остается без изменений.

questions.prompt: Определите правильную косвенную речь для: 'This is the place.'

choices.text: That is the place.
This is the place.
That is this place.
This is that place.

questions.explanation: В косвенной речи указатель 'this' меняется на 'that'.

questions.prompt: Определите правильную косвенную речь для: 'I was here yesterday.'

choices.text: She said she was there yesterday.
She said she was there the day before.
She said she had been there yesterday.
She said she had been there the day before.

questions.explanation: В косвенной речи 'yesterday' меняется на 'the day before', а 'here' — на 'there'.

questions.prompt: Определите правильную косвенную речь для: 'I will see you here tomorrow.'

choices.text: He said he would see me here tomorrow.
He said he would see me there tomorrow.
He said he would see me there the next day.
He said he would see me here the next day.

questions.explanation: В косвенной речи 'here' меняется на 'there', а 'tomorrow' — на 'the next day'.
